name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini with function calling. Tools are declared as `config.tools[].function_declarations[]` with name/description/parameters JSON-schema. The model's tool call comes back as a part `function_call: {name, args}` (args is a dict, NOT a JSON-encoded string — different from OpenAI). Renderer treats it the same visual way as OpenAI's tool_call.

parts.text: What's the weather in Tokyo right now?

function_declarations.name: get_weather
function_declarations.description: Get the current weather for a city.
